summary: 共有risk surfaceの誤fan-out修正は、現HEADでresolverからGate DAG・PR context・Requirement synthesisまで一貫して固定され、旧指摘3件は解消している。
inspection_summary: origin/mainとの差分、resolver実装、27件のfocused regression、Story/Architecture/Spec/registry/Design SSOT、現HEAD verification、PR prepare、旧review結果を確認し、focused test 27/27とtypecheckの成功を確認した。
judgment_delta: gate-evidence-path-surface-propagation: shared-risk fixture is pre-fix-sensitive and now asserts one exact responsibility through resolver, Gate DAG, PR context, Requirement synthesis, and ref count.
gate-evidence-scope-ownership-contradiction: task scope includes design-ssot.json; scope_boundary and Design SSOT reconciliation pass with no out-of-scope files.
gate-evidence-artifact-reconciliation: current-head unit, integration, and typecheck evidence pass; replacing the stale prior review and rerunning pr prepare completes reconciliation.

Path and symbol are identity anchors; risk enriches anchored matches. Explicit risk-only entries, direct contract clause anchors, changed-production-line symbol matching, and fail-closed behavior remain covered.
